$schema: Curated tail-risk hedge basket. Weights sum to 1.0. NOTE: temporarily compressed to a single-market basket for the live submission demo because the original 5-market basket × $5 Jupiter Prediction minimum × small TVL meant no market cleared the per-weight order minimum (DX-GAP-#24 in production). The original 5-market config is preserved below in `_inactive_diversified_basket_NEEDS_RECURATION` — DO NOT restore as-is: 3 of the 5 markets had resolved/closed by 2026-05-07. See per-entry status notes. Re-curate before re-enabling.

markets.thesis: BTC > $90k by EOY 2026 — buying NO is a hedge against a deep crypto drawdown. Closer-to-spot strike than the original POLY-1345530 which has since resolved (BTC crossed $80k during the build, see DX-REPORT history note). NO ask ~$0.32 makes the hedge math attractive: $5.12 cost basis → 16 NO contracts → ~$16 payout if BTC resolves below $90k. Single-market demo basket; full diversified basket preserved in _inactive_diversified_basket_NEEDS_RECURATION for v1.5 (needs market re-curation before restore).

_inactive_diversified_basket_NEEDS_RECUR._warning: DO NOT restore this basket as-is. Probed 2026-05-07 against `GET /prediction/v1/markets/{id}`: 3 of 5 markets are now `status: closed` and will return 400 'No shares available at this price' on order placement (DX-GAP-#21 / #31). Replace closed markets with currently-tradeable equivalents before re-enabling. Run `pnpm --filter @ballast/orchestrator exec tsx src/scripts/findMarket.ts Bitcoin` to discover live candidates.

markets.thesis: BTC > $80k by EOY 2026 — original hedge target.
markets._status_2026-05-07: CLOSED — BTC crossed $80k during the build; market resolved. Replace before restore.

markets.thesis: BTC > $150k by EOY 2026 — buying NO at low premium reflects most of the downside without large capital lockup.
markets._status_2026-05-07: OPEN — but NO ask is $0.91 (very expensive); poor hedge math. YES at $0.11 implies 89% confidence BTC won't hit $150k. Reconsider thesis or replace.

markets.thesis: BTC > $90k by EOY 2026 — closer-to-spot bullish strike.
markets._status_2026-05-07: OPEN with NO at $0.32 — viable. This is the market we promoted to weight 1.0 in the active demo basket.

markets.thesis: Short-dated daily Up/Down for ETH — small allocation to test rapid resolution + claim flow during demos.
markets._status_2026-05-07: CLOSED (closeTime ~April 2026). Daily markets resolve fast; replace with the next live market when re-enabling.

markets.thesis: Short-dated daily Up/Down for BTC — same role as the ETH one.
markets._status_2026-05-07: CLOSED (closeTime ~April 2026). Same fix as the ETH daily.
